To address these concerns, the app needs to prioritize support, transparency, and performance enhancements.

Many users expressed frustration with the support system, citing unresponsive customer support and hidden charges. Some users appreciated the app's user-friendly interface and investment features, but others reported issues with bank account linking, data privacy, and US stock trading. Overall, users are seeking improvements in customer support, transparency, and usability.
